action.reasoning: Observation: Baseline ResNet50 achieved test balanced accuracy 0.22 with large gap to validation (0.56). Rare classes (bird,coyote,squirrel) 0% recall. Analysis: Simple architecture insufficient for domain shift. Need stronger representation (CLIP/DINO) and robust domain generalization. Decision: Upgrade to CLIP ViT-B/16 backbone (pre-downloaded), add mixup + RandAugment augmentation, use differential learning rates, train 15 epochs to measure improvement and iteration time.
